name: 👶 Dependent Deep
description: Full regression loop. Queue-style dependent base, thick diapers, no progression out. Great for a long passive wear session.

customMicroEvents.label: Warm Seep
customMicroEvents.flow: Without much warning, warmth quietly spreads into the front of your diaper.

customMicroEvents.label: Passive Drip
customMicroEvents.flow: A few soft drips escape on their own while you barely react.

customMicroEvents.label: Blanket Melt
customMicroEvents.flow: Relaxing too much turns into a slow leak that just keeps going for a moment.

customFullEvents.label: Automatic Emptying
customFullEvents.flow: Your bladder gives up in one passive, heavy emptying with no real fight.

customFullEvents.label: Sleepy Flood
customFullEvents.flow: You go soft and hazy, and the rest of your bladder empties into padding all at once.
